permits.description: rehabilitation of old main library to new asian art museum
renovation and addition to (e) bldg adding approx. 12,000 sq feet of gallery space. fire protection under separate permit
construction of a temporary art installation w/in an (e) gallery space. work include temporary partitions, floor & ceiling finishes and modifications to (e) air conditioning and lighting systems

work includes and repl of (e) pedestal paver system including ramps and stairs . repair (e) waterproofind system as required. install (n) concrete stairs, ramps and curbs to replace matching (e) rise and run. tread depths and heights. install (n) handrails sim to (e) attachmts. demo ref 202205194618
plaster repair & repainting-ext walls,builtup roof, interior

fire only for the phase 2 fire alarm device replacement project; the devices being replaced are 171 smoke detectors, 33 duct detectors, and 150 modules. no ref. permit application number for this work.
